3212540.name: ARCADIA: House of gods
3212540.description:
SQUADX proudly presents Arcadia: House of God, a Hack-and-Slash Team Showdown that blends high-speed action, strategic team play, and a futuristic sci-fi world. Enter the battlefield and compete for control over Anima, a powerful artifact that can reshape destiny.

Engage in fast-paced melee combat, customize your warrior with unique abilities, and challenge others in intense team-based battles. With deep character progression and diverse combat styles, every match is a test of skill and strategy. Do you have what it takes to claim victory?
3212540.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
